title: Apache Config Error
hints: Test the apache2 config: apache2ctl configtest — read the error carefully
The error points to a specific file. Read it: cat /etc/apache2/conf-enabled/winlab.conf
There is a typo in the directive name on line 2. 'ServerNaame' is not a valid Apache directive
Validate and start: apache2ctl configtest && apache2ctl start
